calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-14-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-14-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Andrew Ford, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Asset Acceptance, LLC.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant Juana Amanza.
Declaration of Andrew Ford and Declaration of David Den Houten admitted in evidence.
Defedants Does 1-20 dismissed without prejudice.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff Asset Acceptance, LLC and against Juana Almanza as follows:
Principal $2,311.48
Pre-Judgment Interest $464.94
Attorney's Fees $520.00
Costs $464.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $3,760.42
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2012 Set For Trial On Jan-14-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-11-2012 Off Calendar
